AI-Powered Penetration Testing

Security testing
that thinks
for itself

Describe your target in plain English. XCloak's AI plans the attack, orchestrates 7 Docker security tools in parallel, validates findings, and generates a professional PDF report — automatically.

Start free — no card neededSee pricing →

3 free scans/day · No credit card · Instant setup

xcloak terminal
$ xcloak scan --target api.company.com
[AI] Planning: nmap → nuclei → nikto
[✓] Port 443: TLSv1.2 · nginx 1.24
[!] CVE-2024-1234 · CVSS 9.1 · CRITICAL
[AI] Proposing: sqlmap -u api.company.com/login
[✓] SQL Injection confirmed · Report generated

Security tools

Pro plan / mo

Everything a security team needs

From recon to report, all in one platform — at a price that doesn't require board approval.

🤖
AI Orchestration
Describe your target in plain English. AI plans the attack chain, picks the right tools, and adapts based on what it finds.
🐳
7 Docker Tools
nmap, nuclei, sqlmap, nikto, gobuster, ffuf, whatweb — all containerized, isolated, and orchestrated automatically.
🔗
CVE Correlation
Every finding is cross-referenced against the live CVE database. Get CVSS scores, attack vectors, and patches instantly.
📄
PDF Reports
Professional pentest reports generated by AI. Compliance-mapped for SOC2, ISO27001, and PCI-DSS. Ready to share.
🔄
Real-time Feedback Loop
AI validates findings after each tool, removes false positives, and proposes follow-up tasks before you even ask.
🏆
Community Hub
CVE tracker, exploit database, CTF challenges, learning paths, and leaderboard. Learn while you test.

How it works

01
Describe the target
Type your goal in plain English. No config needed.
02
AI builds the plan
Claude orchestrates nmap, nuclei, nikto and more in parallel.
03
Get the report
A professional PDF with findings, CVE IDs, CVSS scores, and remediation.

Start free. Scale when ready.

Free tier gives you 3 real scans per day, forever. Pro unlocks AI analysis, PDF reports, and all tools for ₹999/month.
